title: acrophorus javensis
intro: Acrophorus javensis, also known as sea lavender or spike lavender, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Acrophorus javensis include relief from anxiety and insomnia due to its calming effects, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Acrophorus javensis can be made into teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
